name: wordpress-architect-review
description: Senior WordPress architect code review for plugins and themes. File-by-file audit covering security, performance, architecture, correctness, WordPress standards, accessibility, i18n, and missing infrastructure. Produces a 1-10 scorecard, severity-tagged findings (SEVERE / MODERATE / MINOR), file:line citations, quoted offending code, top-5 prioritized fixes, and an optional 3-phase refactor roadmap.
